allow: Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where processid=12980 get processid,name,commandline 2>&1")
Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where processid=12980 get processid,name")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-EventLog -LogName System -After '2026-03-29 17:00' -Before '2026-03-29 20:00' -Source 'Microsoft-Windows-Kernel-Power','Microsoft-Windows-Power-Troubleshooter','Microsoft-Windows-Kernel-General' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table TimeGenerated, EntryType, Source, Message -Wrap")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; StartTime='2026-03-29 17:00'; EndTime='2026-03-29 20:00'; Id=1,42,107,187,507,506} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table TimeCreated, Id, Message -Wrap" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; StartTime='2026-03-29 17:00'; EndTime='2026-03-29 20:00'} -MaxEvents 50 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \\$_.ProviderName -match 'Power|Kernel|Sleep|Wake|Docker' } | Format-Table TimeCreated, Id, ProviderName, Message -Wrap")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; StartTime='2026-03-29 15:00'; EndTime='2026-03-29 23:00'} -MaxEvents 200 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 100 TimeCreated, Id, ProviderName, LevelDisplayName | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; StartTime='2026-03-29 15:00'; EndTime='2026-03-30 00:00'; Id=2004} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TimeCreated, Message | Format-List")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process -Name 'claude' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, WorkingSet64, VirtualMemorySize64, Handles, StartTime, CommandLine | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process -Name 'claude' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object WorkingSet64 -Descending | Select-Object Id, @{N='WS_MB';E={[math]::Round\(\\$_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}}, @{N='VM_MB';E={[math]::Round\(\\$_.VirtualMemorySize64/1MB\)}}, @{N='PM_MB';E={[math]::Round\(\\$_.PrivateMemorySize64/1MB\)}}, Handles, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process -Name 'claude' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property WorkingSet64 -Sum | Select-Object @{N='Total_WS_GB';E={[math]::Round\(\\$_.Sum/1GB,2\)}}, Count")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process -Name 'claude' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property PrivateMemorySize64 -Sum | Select-Object @{N='Total_PM_GB';E={[math]::Round\(\\$_.Sum/1GB,2\)}}, Count")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process -Name 'claude' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \\$_.PrivateMemorySize64 -gt 500MB } | Sort-Object PrivateMemorySize64 -Descending | Select-Object Id, @{N='PM_GB';E={[math]::Round\(\\$_.PrivateMemorySize64/1GB,2\)}}, @{N='WS_MB';E={[math]::Round\(\\$_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}}, Handles, @{N='Running_Hours';E={[math]::Round\(\(\(Get-Date\) - \\$_.StartTime\).TotalHours,1\)}}, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process -Id 270 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CPU" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime | Format-Table" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "& sqlite3.exe 'C:/Users/YAIR/nanoclaw/nanoclaw.db' 'SELECT jid, name, channel FROM chats WHERE is_group=0 ORDER BY last_message_time DESC LIMIT 10'" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "docker run --rm -e ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:3001 -e CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN=placeholder nanoclaw-agent:latest echo 'container ok' 2>&1")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$result = docker run -i --rm --name test-nanoclaw-debug -e TZ=Asia/Jerusalem -e ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:3001 -e CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN=placeholder -v 'C:\\Users\\YAIR\\nanoclaw:/workspace/project:ro' -v '/dev/null:/workspace/project/.env:ro' -v 'C:\\Users\\YAIR\\nanoclaw\\groups\\whatsapp_main:/workspace/group' nanoclaw-agent:latest echo ok 2>&1
echo \\"Exit: \\$LASTEXITCODE\\"
echo \\$result
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$input = '{\\"messages\\":[],\\"sessionId\\":\\"test\\",\\"groupName\\":\\"test\\",\\"isMain\\":true,\\"channel\\":\\"whatsapp\\"}'
\\$result = echo \\$input | docker run -i --rm -e TZ=Asia/Jerusalem -e ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:3001 -e CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN=placeholder -v 'C:\\Users\\YAIR\\nanoclaw:/workspace/project:ro' -v '/dev/null:/workspace/project/.env:ro' -v 'C:\\Users\\YAIR\\nanoclaw\\groups\\whatsapp_main:/workspace/group' -v 'C:\\Users\\YAIR\\nanoclaw\\data\\sessions\\whatsapp_main\\.claude:/home/node/.claude' -v 'C:\\Users\\YAIR\\nanoclaw\\data\\sessions\\whatsapp_main\\agent-runner-src:/app/src' nanoclaw-agent:latest 2>&1
echo \\"Exit: \\$LASTEXITCODE\\"
\\$result | Select-Object -First 10
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Microsoft-Windows-TaskScheduler/Operational';Id=100,101,102,103,107,129,200,201,325} -MaxEvents 20 2>$null | Where-Object { $_.Message -like '*Beedo*' -or $_.Message -like '*NanoClaw*' } | Format-Table TimeCreated, Id, Message -AutoSize -Wrap" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName="Microsoft-Windows-TaskScheduler/Operational"} -MaxEvents 50 | Where-Object { $_.Message -like "*Beedo*" -or $_.Message -like "*NanoClaw*" } | Format-Table TimeCreated, Id, Message -AutoSize -Wrap' 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion\\Winlogon" -Name AutoAdminLogon, DefaultUserName -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-List' 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'try { Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion\\Winlogon" -Name AutoAdminLogon -ErrorAction Stop | Select -ExpandProperty AutoAdminLogon } catch { Write-Output "NOT_SET" }' 2>&1)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-Process -Name node | Select-Object Id, StartTime, Path, CommandLine | Format-List' 2>&1)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name=\\"node.exe\\"" | Select-Object ProcessId, CreationDate, CommandLine | Format-List' 2>&1)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter 'Name=\\"node.exe\\"' | Select-Object ProcessId, CreationDate, CommandLine | Format-List" 2>&1)
